name: Scrambled Eggs Benedict
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sauce as directed on the package in a 2-cup glass measure.
2. Microwave the sauce uncovered on high for 1 minute; stir. Continue microwaving until the mixture boils and thickens, about 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds.
3. Cover and microwave the Canadian bacon on high (100%) for 1 1/2 to 2 minutes or until hot.
4. Beat the eggs in a 1-qt casserole dish. Add the milk, chopped green peppers, salt, and pepper. Cover and microwave on high for 2 minutes; stir.
5. Continue microwaving until the eggs are set but still moist, about 1 to 1 1/2 minutes.
6. Place the split English muffins cut-side up on a serving plate. Top each with bacon slices and a large spoonful of egg mixture.
7. Spoon the sauce over the eggs.
8. Microwave uncovered on high for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes until hot.
Note: This recipe can be made with smoked ham slices instead of the Canadian bacon.
